# BundledMum

> Curated maternity and baby essentials for Nigerian mums — making being a mum easier with budget-friendly bundles, hospital lists, and a quiz that recommends exactly what you need.

BundledMum helps expectant and new mums in Nigeria prepare for baby with curated product bundles, a personalised quiz, and honest guidance. Every product is selected for the Nigerian market — climate, budget, and preferences.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Shop bundles, take the quiz, and discover curated maternity essentials.
- [About](/about): Our story and why BundledMum exists.
- [Bundles](/bundles): Maternity lists and kits organised by budget.
- [Shop](/shop): Browse all individual products and categories.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Get a personalised bundle recommendation based on your budget and needs.
- [Push Gifts](/push-gifts): Thoughtful gifts for new mums.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and guides for Nigerian mums.
- [Track Order](/track-order): Check the status of an order.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with our team.

## Optional

- [Returns](/returns): Returns and refunds policy.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Cookies](/cookies): Cookie policy.
